scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.clean:port4000: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; exit 0"
scripts.clean:port5173: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; exit 0"
scripts.dev: npm run clean:port4000 && npm run clean:port5173 && concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
